title: SOURCE SECRET TOPIC SENTENCE IMPROVEMENT 401 500 BY

questions.question: Q401. Natwar was a fraudster who always tried to fooling others. (SSC CGL 17/07/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'To' के साथ verb की first form (deceive) का प्रयोग होगा. 'Fooling' गलत है.

questions.question: Q402. The Indian independence movement sought to establish the conceptions of freedom and social welfare as the goals of an independent Indian state. (SSC CGL 17/07/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Conceptions of freedom' के स्थान पर 'Concepts of liberty' (स्वतंत्रता की अवधारणा) अधिक उपयुक्त है.

questions.question: Q403. Carolina opened a savings account to save money for later. (SSC CGL 17/07/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'For a rainy day' एक idiom है जिसका अर्थ है 'भविष्य की जरूरतों/मुसीबत के लिए बचत करना'.

questions.question: Q404. The management is not beware of this fact. (SSC CGL 17/07/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Beware' का प्रयोग 'is' के साथ नहीं होता. 'Aware of' (जानकार होना) सही है.

questions.question: Q405. Last week's rain ravaged the whole city. (SSC CGL 18/07/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Ravaged' का अर्थ है 'बुरी तरह नष्ट करना', जो 'Ruined' के समान है.

questions.question: Q406. National development is defined as an improvement in people's daily arrangements. (SSC CGL 18/07/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Daily arrangements' के स्थान पर 'Living conditions' (जीवन स्तर) सही शब्द है.

questions.question: Q407. Please ask the dog to get of my couch. (SSC CGL 18/07/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Get off' (हटना/उतरना) सही phrasal verb है.

questions.question: Q408. The mob drove on the rampage and looted several shops in the locality. (SSC CGL 18/07/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Went on the rampage' (उपद्रव मचाना) सही idiom है.

questions.question: Q409. I don't wear the sunglasses at the moment. (SSC CGL 18/07/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'At the moment' के लिए Present Continuous Tense ('I'm not wearing') का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q410. Her hopes for building her own house were beaten when she lost her jewellery box. (SSC CGL 18/07/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: उम्मीदों के टूटने के लिए 'hopes were dashed' का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q411. Irene went to office every single day by walk. (SSC CGL 18/07/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: पैदल चलने के लिए 'on foot' सही phrase है.

questions.question: Q412. In times of difficulty, she preys for an oracle to guide her. (SSC CGL 18/07/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Preys' (शिकार करना) गलत है, सही शब्द 'Prays' (प्रार्थना करना) है.

questions.question: Q413. In today's digital age, information is widely available to everyone by many means of media such as television, newspapers, films, and social media. (SSC CGL 19/07/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Forms of media' (मीडिया के विभिन्न रूप) सही अभिव्यक्ति है.

questions.question: Q414. Abhijeet feels extremely tired after working all day long. (SSC CGL 19/07/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Extremely tired' के लिए एक शब्द 'Exhausted' है.

questions.question: Q415. Disability was viewed as God's retribution for wickedness in the past. (SSC CGL 20/07/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Retribution for wickedness' का अर्थ है 'punishment for wrongdoing' (गलत काम की सजा).

questions.question: Q416. Many noticeable people were present at the function. (SSC CGL 20/07/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: महत्वपूर्ण लोगों के लिए 'Notable' शब्द का प्रयोग होता है, 'Noticeable' (दिखने योग्य) का नहीं.

questions.question: Q417. Brian remained silent during the board meeting, though Rahul was unaware that he had an ace up his sheath the entire time. (SSC CGL 20/07/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: 'An ace up his sleeve' (गुप्त लाभ) सही idiom है.

questions.question: Q418. Bajrang is in extreme pain in his teeth. (SSC CGL 21/07/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Extreme pain' (अत्यधिक दर्द) के लिए 'Agony' शब्द उपयुक्त है.

questions.question: Q419. The players distributed the reward between themselves. (SSC CGL 21/07/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: दो से अधिक लोगों (players) के लिए 'among' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q420. Greenhouse gases trapped beside Earth's atmosphere cause global warming. (SSC CGL 21/07/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: गैसें वातावरण के 'inside' (अंदर) फंसी होती हैं.

questions.question: Q422. During the wedding ceremony, the bride seemed even quieter and more diffident than usual. (SSC CGL 21/07/2023 3rd Shift)
options: Giving a false or misleading impression
Shy due to lack of confidence
questions.explanation: 'Diffident' का अर्थ है 'Shy due to lack of confidence' (आत्मविश्वास की कमी के कारण शर्मीला).

questions.question: Q423. Parents should tell their children to exercise great care when crossed busy roads. (SSC CGL 21/07/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: 'When' के बाद बिना subject के verb की 'ing' form (crossing) का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q424. This compartment is reserved for military person. (SSC CGL 21/07/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: सेना के कर्मचारियों के लिए 'Military personnel' सही शब्द है.

questions.question: Q425. Abraham Lincoln has been the sixteenth president of the United States and save the Union at the American Civil war. (SSC CGL 24/07/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Past events के लिए 'Saved' (V2) और 'during' (युद्ध के दौरान) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q426. My friend Meera and her mother is visiting me this weekend. (SSC CGL 25/07/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Plural subject (Meera and her mother) के साथ 'are' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q427. The commanders entered by force into terrorists' camp. (SSC CGL 25/07/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Broke into' (जबरदस्ती घुसना) सही phrasal verb है.

questions.question: Q428. The young boy displayed an aptitude on scientific research. (SSC CGL 25/07/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Aptitude' के साथ 'for' preposition का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q429. He had given me that book in 1999. (SSC CGL 25/07/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 1999 (Past time) के साथ Simple Past Tense ('gave') का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q430. There is a charm on the midnight air which all cannot experience. (SSC CGL 26/07/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: हवा में (in the air) कुछ होने के लिए 'in' preposition का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q431. Being a practiced liar, it was totally normal for him to utter a complete and blatant lie. (SSC CGL 26/07/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Lie' (झूठ) का पर्यायवाची 'Falsehood' है.

questions.question: Q432. Pintu has been advised to reduce smoking by his family doctor. (SSC CGL 26/07/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Cut down' (कम करना) सही phrasal verb है.

questions.question: Q433. The heavy medications... will surely turn a patient completely lifeless and unresponsive. (SSC CGL 26/07/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Cadaverous' का अर्थ है 'शव जैसा' (lifeless), जो यहाँ उपयुक्त है.

questions.question: Q434. I worked hard so that I might success. (SSC CGL 27/07/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Modal 'might' के बाद verb की first form ('succeed') का प्रयोग होगा. 'Success' noun है.

questions.question: Q435. The stranger stood quietly for few moments. (SSC CGL 27/07/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'A few' (कुछ) का प्रयोग सकारात्मक अर्थ में होता है.

questions.question: Q436. He did not stop until it was remarked that he was speaking at length about trivial things. (SSC CGL 27/07/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Rambling' का अर्थ है 'बेमतलब की लंबी बातें करना'.

questions.question: Q437. The question was raised for discussion before the members during the assembly session. (SSC CGL 27/07/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Came up' का अर्थ है 'चर्चा के लिए सामने आना'.

questions.question: Q438. The rebels laid up their arms (SSC Selection Post Phase-XI Graduate Level 27/06/2023 Shift-4)
questions.explanation: 'Laid down arms' (हथियार डालना/आत्मसमर्पण करना) सही मुहावरा है.

questions.question: Q439. She has gained a lot of fame but still she is very realistic and sensible. (SSC Selection Post Phase-XI Graduate Level 27/06/2023 Shift-4)
questions.explanation: 'Down to earth' (व्यवहारिक) का अर्थ है 'realistic and sensible'.

questions.question: Q440. He was advised for walking alone in the neighbourhood. (SSC Selection Post Phase-XI Graduate Level 27/06/2023 Shift-4)
questions.explanation: किसी काम को न करने की सलाह देने के लिए 'advised against' का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q441. The volunteers of the organisation refused point blank of do what was requested. (SSC Selection Post Phase-XI Graduate Level 30/06/2023 Shift-1)
options: refused in point blank of doing
questions.explanation: 'Refuse' के बाद infinitive ('to do') का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q442. Students were asked to write the historical events in the order of their occurrence. (SSC Selection Post Phase-XI Matriculation Level 30/06/2023 Shift-4)
questions.explanation: घटनाओं के घटित होने के क्रम को 'Chronological order' कहते हैं.

questions.question: Q443. Raju did very well in the exam, he must study well. (SSC CHSL Tier II 26/06/2023)
questions.explanation: Past की संभावना/निष्कर्ष के लिए 'must have + V3' का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q444. The unit twitched like a bird (preening it's plumage and becomes motionless). (SSC MTS 02/05/2023 Morning)
options: preening its plumage and became motionless
preening it's plumage while becoming motionless
to preen it's plumage and and becomes motionless
questions.explanation: 'It's' (it is) गलत है, 'its' (possessive) सही है. Tense consistency के लिए 'became' (past) होगा.

questions.question: Q445. No, they are normal people, (although they perceive the world different). (SSC MTS 02/05/2023 Afternoon)
options: but they perceive the world differently
from they perceive the world differently
while they perceive the world different
questions.explanation: Contrast के लिए 'but' और verb को modify करने के लिए adverb 'differently' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q446. At the grocery store, coffee is in an same aisles as tea. (SSC MTS 02/05/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: 'Same' से पहले article 'the' का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q447. The rodeo is (great way to unite soldier's skills and build) esprit de corps. (SSC MTS 03/05/2023 Morning)
options: a great way to unite soldiers' skills and build
great way to unite soldier's skills and building
a great way to unite an soldier's skill and build
questions.explanation: Singular noun 'way' के लिए article 'a' और plural possession के लिए 'soldiers'' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q448. The waiter giving the diners some complimentary mints. (SSC MTS 03/05/2023 Morning)
questions.explanation: Sentence में main verb की जरूरत है, इसलिए Past Indefinite 'gave' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q449. The water leaked in with a hole in the roof. (SSC MTS 03/05/2023 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: माध्यम के लिए 'through' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q450. This looks (like one of those unwelcome social summons which call upon a man) either to be bored or to lie. (SSC MTS 03/05/2023 Evening)
options: like one of those unwelcome social summonses which call upon a man
like one of these unwelcome social summons that call upon a man
like one of those unwelcome social summon that call upon a man
questions.explanation: 'Summons' singular है, इसका plural 'summonses' होता है. 'One of those' के बाद plural noun आएगा.

questions.question: Q451. She ran 12 kms at a stretch, (which are a greater) distance for a rookie. (SSC MTS 04/05/2023 Morning)
questions.explanation: Distance (singular concept) के लिए 'is' का प्रयोग होगा. 'Quite some distance' सही phrase है.

questions.question: Q452. This preoccupation with him was becoming an obsession (that was beginning to effect her ability) to take care of the house. (SSC MTS 04/05/2023 Morning)
options: that was beginning to affect her ability
which was beginning to effect her ability
which was begin to affect her ability
questions.explanation: 'Effect' (noun) के स्थान पर 'Affect' (verb) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q453. The cat was lastly see in the backyard. (SSC MTS 04/05/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: Passive voice में 'was' के बाद verb की 3rd form ('seen') आएगी. 'Lastly' नहीं, 'last' सही है.

questions.question: Q454. Watch your step - the third stair have a broken tread. (SSC MTS 08/05/2023 Morning)
questions.explanation: Singular subject 'third stair' के साथ 'has' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q455. He suggested (there was collusions through objectors, due to similarities) in some letters sent to the council. (SSC MTS 09/05/2023 Morning)
options: there was collusions from the objector, due to similarities
there was collusion between objectors, due to similarities
their was collusion by the objectors, due to similarities
questions.explanation: 'Collusion' (मिलीभगत) uncountable है और यह गुटों के 'between' होती है.

questions.question: Q456. Raccoons have being more active at night. (SSC MTS 09/05/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: General fact के लिए Simple Present Tense ('are') का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q457. With a (sudden push off understanding), Harry realised who the people in the end beds must be. (SSC MTS 09/05/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: 'Sudden rush of understanding' (अचानक समझ आना) सही phrase है.

questions.question: Q458. (In fact, climbing fern is spreading so rapidly that its) now the state's worst invasive weed. (SSC MTS 10/05/2023 Morning)
options: In fact, climbing fern is spreading so rapid that it's
In fact, climbing fern is spread so rapidly that its
In fact, climbing fern is spreading so rapidly that it's
questions.explanation: 'Its' (possessive) के स्थान पर 'It's' (it is) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q459. (Much times), I have felt that conversations like these must take place in person (SSC MTS 10/05/2023 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: 'Many a time' (कई बार) सही idiom है.

questions.question: Q460. One of the main climbing routes, approaches the summit from the southeast (in the Nepal). (SSC MTS 10/05/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: देश के नाम (Nepal) से पहले article 'the' का प्रयोग नहीं होता.

questions.question: Q461. My history assignment is due on Wednesday. (SSC MTS 11/05/2023 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: वाक्य grammatically सही है.

questions.question: Q462. Bonaparte, unlike Hoche, was not (eagerly to embark in) a serious Irish expedition. (SSC MTS 11/05/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: Adjective 'eager' और preposition 'on' (embark on) का प्रयोग सही है.

questions.question: Q463. I'll see you in the meets next week. (SSC MTS 11/05/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: 'In the meets' गलत है, 'at the meeting' सही है.

questions.question: Q464. In the summer, the weathering can be very hot around here. (SSC MTS 12/05/2023 Morning)
questions.explanation: 'Weathering' (चट्टानों का अपक्षय) के स्थान पर 'weather' (मौसम) सही है.

questions.question: Q465. The (captain with the members of his team) failed to qualify for the African Nations Cup finals. (SSC MTS 12/05/2023 Afternoon)
options: captain along with the members of his team
captain along side the members of his team
questions.explanation: 'Captain and his team' (plural subject) के साथ plural verb 'failed' का सही तालमेल है. (हालांकि failed past है, 'and' संयोजक बेहतर है).

questions.question: Q466. The query isn't (whether he will admit it, but when). (SSC MTS 12/05/2023 Evening)
options: whether he will be admitting it or not, but when?
whether or nor he will admit it, but when?
whether he will admit it or not, but when?
questions.explanation: वाक्य grammatically सही है (सवाल यह नहीं कि 'क्या', बल्कि 'कब').

questions.question: Q467. The (roof collapsing) in a roar of rock and rubble. (SSC MTS 12/05/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: वाक्य में main verb की आवश्यकता है, इसलिए 'collapsed' (V2) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q468. The Tagore House is rehearsing a skit for the school's Annual Day Function. (SSC MTS 15/05/2023 Morning)
questions.explanation: वाक्य grammatically सही है.

questions.question: Q469. The tourists (rendered to the) museum on time. (SSC MTS 15/05/2023 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: किसी स्थान पर पहुंचने के लिए 'arrived at' का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q470. The number of homes with running watered has been rising sharply since 1985. (SSC MTS 15/05/2023 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: 'Running water' (नल का पानी) सही phrase है.

questions.question: Q471. She was fined of driving over the speed limit. (SSC MTS 15/05/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: कारण बताने के लिए 'fined for' का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q472. Apple has also introduced a (rule that seemed tie) to its recent dispute with Basecamp (SSC MTS 15/05/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: Present context (has introduced) के लिए 'seems' और passive sense के लिए 'tied' (जुड़ा हुआ) सही है.

questions.question: Q473. The cat sits in the window and staring at the squirrel. (SSC MTS 16/05/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: Parallelism के अनुसार 'sits' (V1+s) के साथ 'stares' (V1+s) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q474. (The transit of the Planet of Love happen in pairs), eight years apart every century. (SSC MTS 16/05/2023 Evening)
options: The transits of the Planet of Love happen in pairs
The transits of the Planet of Love happens at pairs
The transit of Planet of Love happen in pairs
questions.explanation: Verb 'happen' (plural) के लिए subject 'transits' (plural) होना चाहिए.

questions.question: Q475. Some of them were nearly (as hard as ligament, and many an inch in length). (SSC MTS 17/05/2023 Morning)
options: as hard as ligaments, and many were an inch long
hard as ligament, and many an inch at length
as hard as a ligament, and many an inches in length
questions.explanation: 'Ligaments' (plural) सही तुलना के लिए और 'inch long' (adjective phrase) सही है.

questions.question: Q476. The only course of action to (fend of the loud clamor off conspiracy theories) is to keep everyone fully informed. (SSC MTS 17/05/2023 Afternoon)
options: fend off the loud clamour of conspiracy theories
fend off the loud clamour off conspiracy theories
fend of the loud clamour of conspiracy Theories
questions.explanation: 'Fend off' (बचाव करना) सही phrasal verb है और 'of' (का) सही preposition है.

questions.question: Q477. We were asked by (Jane's aunt where she was last night.) (SSC MTS 17/05/2023 Evening)
options: Jane aunt's where she was last night?
Jane's aunt where was she last night.
Jane's aunt where was she was last night?
questions.explanation: Indirect question का structure (where + subject + verb) सही है.

questions.question: Q478. This has sharp decreased the cases of water-borne diseases. (SSC MTS 17/05/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: Verb 'decreased' को modify करने के लिए adverb 'sharply' की आवश्यकता है.

questions.question: Q479. (Beside myself the only English people) there were Keith and Doreen. (SSC MTS 18/05/2023 Morning)
options: Besides I, the only English speaking people
Besides myself, the only English people
Beside me, the only English people
questions.explanation: 'Beside' (बगल में) के स्थान पर 'Besides' (के अतिरिक्त) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q480. There has been a spate of some unfortunately events in Madurai. (SSC MTS 18/05/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: Noun 'events' के लिए adjective 'unfortunate' का प्रयोग होगा, adverb 'unfortunately' का नहीं.

questions.question: Q481. I received word that you (were attempting) to contact me. (SSC MTS 19/05/2023 Morning)
questions.explanation: 'You' के साथ 'were' सही है.

questions.question: Q482. (Plots to dispose him came) to nothing. (SSC MTS 19/05/2023 Morning)
options: Plots to dispose off him comes
Plots to dispose of him came
questions.explanation: 'Dispose of' (छुटकारा पाना/हटाना) सही phrasal verb है.

questions.question: Q483. The Bank of New York has increased (interest rates four times from last January.) (SSC MTS 19/05/2023 Afternoon)
options: interest rates four times since last January.
the interest rates four time from last January.
interest rates from last January, four times.
questions.explanation: Point of time (last January) के लिए 'since' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q484. Drive two blocks and turn right at the traffic lights. (SSC MTS 19/05/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: वाक्य grammatically सही है.

questions.question: Q485. (Because he has been in custody from last July.) Pickard will now be released in four months. (SSC MTS 19/05/2023 Evening)
options: Because he had been under custody from last July,
Because he has been in custody since last July,
Because he had been in custody from last July,
questions.explanation: Point of time के लिए 'since' का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q486. He lost his temper (by a driver) flashed her headlights as he overtook. (SSC MTS 13/06/2023 Morning)
questions.explanation: 'After' (के बाद) सही conjunction है जो घटना का कारण बता रहा है.

questions.question: Q487. (There's many a good tunes) played on an old violin. (SSC MTS 13/06/2023 Morning)
options: There are many a good tunes
questions.explanation: 'Many' के साथ plural noun 'tunes' और plural verb 'are' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q488. Even in time of natural disasters, the farmers had to pay their share of taxes. (SSC MTS 13/06/2023 Morning)
questions.explanation: 'In times of' (के समय में) सही phrase है.

questions.question: Q489. Christian turned round and (strided off into) the blackness and I got into my car. (SSC MTS 13/06/2023 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: 'Stride' का past tense 'strode' होता है, 'strided' नहीं. 'Off' सही है.

questions.question: Q490. How (can a book such as) be written before I'd lived the incidents it described? (SSC MTS 13/06/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: Past context (before I'd lived) के लिए 'could' (past of can) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q491. He lights his pipe, (and on many an evenings he helps me with) dishes. (SSC MTS 14/06/2023 Evening)
options: and on many evenings he helped me with the
and on many evenings he helps me with the
and many an evenings he helps me with the
questions.explanation: 'Many an' के साथ singular noun आता है, या 'Many' के साथ plural (evenings). Article 'the' (the dishes) आवश्यक है.

questions.question: Q492. That is not a solution available (to most people for who email has become necessity.) (SSC MTS 14/06/2023 Evening)
options: to most people for who email has become a necessity.
to most people for whom email has become a necessity.
for most people to whom email has became necessity.
questions.explanation: Preposition 'for' के बाद objective pronoun 'whom' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q493. His temperament (disposed him to) argue readily with people. (SSC MTS 15/06/2023 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: 'Disposed to' (प्रवृत्त होना) सही phrase है.

questions.question: Q494. (The shocked entrance) of so many witnesses seemed to have brought them to their senses. (SSC MTS 15/06/2023 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: 'Shocked entrance' गलत है, 'unexpected entrance' (अप्रत्याशित प्रवेश) सही है.

questions.question: Q495. The relationship between two people is (by the way in what) they feel and behave towards each other. (SSC MTS 16/06/2023 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: 'The way in which' (जिस तरह से) सही phrase है.

questions.question: Q496. Besides the atmospheric changes that make us sweat, (hormonal or emotional stimulus can also cause sweating). (SSC MTS 16/06/2023 Afternoon)
options: hormonal and emotional stimuli also causes sweating
hormonal or emotional stimuli can also cause sweating
hormonal or emotional stimulus also causing sweating
questions.explanation: दो कारक (hormonal and emotional) हैं, इसलिए 'and' और plural 'stimuli' सही है. (Note: 'Causes' singular verb with plural subject seems to be the intended SSC answer based on source, despite grammar).

questions.question: Q497. We've made extraordinary (flowering as a) society in that regard. (SSC MTS 16/06/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: 'Progress' (प्रगति) समाज के संदर्भ में 'flowering' से अधिक उपयुक्त है.

questions.question: Q498. It is expected that this police power will only apply to air and (sea routes between the Great Britain and the Northern Ireland). (SSC MTS 16/06/2023 Evening)
options: sea routes across the Great Britain and Northern Ireland
sea routes across the Great Britain and the Northern Ireland
sea routes between Great Britain and Northern Ireland
questions.explanation: देशों के नाम (Great Britain, Northern Ireland) से पहले article 'the' का प्रयोग नहीं होता.

questions.question: Q499. I like to hang my laundry outside in the suns to dry. (SSC MTS 19/06/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: 'Sun' (सूरज/धूप) uncountable/singular है, 'suns' गलत है.

questions.question: Q500. It was a (easement to be far away) from that malicious old labyrinth with its stares and gossip. (SSC MTS 19/06/2023 Evening)
questions.explanation: 'Relief' (राहत) सही शब्द है, 'easement' कानूनी शब्द है.
